positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a celestial fox silhouette against a dark indigo night sky. The fox is rendered in clean, crisp lines with an ethereal glow emanating from its tail. Surrounding the fox are stylized constellations of geometric stars and crescent moons, drawn with fine gold line work. The overall composition should be highly symmetric and centered, with deep contrasting midnight blues and accents of celestial gold leaf texture. The art should evoke a sense of magical wilderness and calm wonder, suitable for a wearable apparel print. Highly detailed vector quality, graphic novel aesthetic, strong contrast, flat print colors.
